calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Francisco G. Torres, Esq. of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP (415) 9770444, appearing for Plaintiff; Brett H. Greenberg, Esq. of Schiff Hardin LLP, (415) 901-8782, appearing for Defendant. The Court vacates its tentative ruling. After hearing from counsel, the Court signs "Stipulation and Order Dismissing four affirmative defenses; withdrawing motion for summary adjudication; and providing notice of request for trial date", in Open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
